definitions: v. 使深深扎根；灌输；adj. 根深蒂固的（常用 ingrained）

examples.text: This would be hard to handle for any animal, so it makes sense that we continue to follow the impulses so deeply ingrained in us.
examples.explanation: ingrained 在此处作形容词，修饰 impulses，表示‘根深蒂固的’或‘深入骨髓的’。

reviewSessions.example_text: This would be hard to handle for any animal, so it makes sense that we continue to follow the impulses so deeply ingrained in us.
expected_definitions: v. 使深深扎根；灌输；adj. 根深蒂固的（常用 ingrained）
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案只答到“植入”，与“灌输/使深深扎根”有部分关联，但本句中 ingrained 表示“根深蒂固的”，理解不够准确。
matched_points: 与“使进入、植入”有一定语义关联
部分接近动词义“灌输/使深深扎根”
missing_points: 未体现本句中的形容词义“根深蒂固的”
未表达“深入骨髓、深深扎根”这一程度感
未结合例句中修饰 impulses 的用法理解词性

reviewSessions.example_text: This would be hard to handle for any animal, so it makes sense that we continue to follow the impulses so deeply ingrained in us.
expected_definitions: v. 使深深扎根；灌输；adj. 根深蒂固的（常用 ingrained）
matched_points: 准确回忆出目标词 ingrain

reviewSessions.example_text: This would be hard to handle for any animal, so it makes sense that we continue to follow the impulses so deeply ingrained in us.
expected_definitions: v. 使深深扎根；灌输；adj. 根深蒂固的（常用 ingrained）
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案有一定关联，但未体现“根深蒂固、深深扎根”这一关键含义。
matched_points: 涉及“使进入内部”的方向，和 ingrain 有部分语义关联
missing_points: 未体现“深深扎根”或“根深蒂固”
忽略了例句中 ingrained 作形容词的用法
未准确表达句中“深入骨髓的冲动/本能”之意
